title: About Me
subtitle: Java Software Engineer specializing in Spring Boot, Microservices, and scalable backend applications.
description: Hi, I'm Junaid Javed, a passionate Java Software Engineer with over 2 years of professional experience in designing and developing scalable backend applications. I specialize in Java, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Microservices, REST APIs, MySQL, Redis, Kafka, Docker, and AWS. I enjoy solving complex technical challenges, building secure and high-performance systems, and continuously learning new technologies to deliver innovative software solutions.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (BSCS)
